mnemonics: Never Put Your (NumPy) data in a slow Python list when you need Numerical Python speed for arrays
keyPoints: NumPy provides efficient N-dimensional array objects for numerical computation
It offers vectorized operations that are faster than Python loops
It is the foundational library for data manipulation in Python's scientific ecosystem
commonMistakes: Using Python lists instead of NumPy arrays for numerical operations
Confusing array shapes and dimensions when performing operations
Forgetting to import NumPy (import numpy as np) before using its functions
